name: Chef
description: You gain proficiency with Cook's Utensils and increase your Constitution or Wisdom score by 1. During a Short Rest, you can cook a meal for up to 4 + your Proficiency Bonus creatures; those who eat it and spend Hit Dice regain an extra 1d8 Hit Points. You can also cook treats equal to your Proficiency Bonus during a Long Rest or 1 hour of work; a creature can eat a treat as a Bonus Action to gain Temporary Hit Points equal to your Proficiency Bonus.
